sentences.target: Mon beau-père arrive pour le dîner.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ bo pɛʁ aʁiv puʁ lə dine/

translations.fr: Mon beau-père arrive pour le dîner.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ bo pɛʁ aʁiv puʁ lə dine/
translations.en: My stepfather is coming for dinner.
translations.it: Il mio patrigno viene a cena.
translations.pt: Meu padrasto vem para o jantar.
translations.he: האבא החורג שלי בא לארוחת ערב.
translations.vi: Bố dượng tôi đến ăn tối.
translations.nl: Mijn stiefvader komt voor het avondeten.
translations.hi: मेरे सौतेले पिता रात के खाने के लिए आ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ο πατριός μου έρχεται για δείπνο.
translations.id: Ayah tiri saya datang untuk makan malam.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu vitreg vine la cină.
translations.cs: Můj nevlastní otec přijde na večeři.
translations.ja: 私の継父が夕食に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies the noun 'beau-père'.
Compound common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement ('for').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'dîner'.
Common noun meaning 'dinner'; object of the preposition 'pour'.

translations.pt: Estou ligando para o meu padrasto.
translations.vi: Tôi đang gọi cho bố dượng.
translations.hi: मैं अपने सौतेले पिता को फोन कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ro: Îl sun pe tatăl meu vitreg.
translations.ja: 私は継父に電話しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of phoning.
Preposition 'to', introducing the indirect object.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'beau-père'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à'.

sentences.target: Son beau-père répare la machine à laver.
sentences.reading: /sɔ̃ bo pɛʁ ʁepaʁ la maʃin a lave/

translations.fr: Son beau-père répare la machine à laver.
translations.ipa: /sɔ̃ bo pɛʁ ʁepaʁ la maʃin a lave/
translations.en: His stepfather is fixing the washing machine.
translations.es: Su padrastro está arreglando la lavadora.
translations.it: Il suo patrigno sta riparando la lavatrice.
translations.pt: O padrasto dele está consertando a máquina de lavar.
translations.he: האבא החורג שלו מתקן את מכונת הכביסה.
translations.tr: Onun üvey babası çamaşır makinesini tamir ediyor.
translations.vi: Bố dượng của anh ấy đang sửa máy giặt.
translations.hu: Az ő mostohaapja szereli a mosógépet.
translations.hi: उसका सौतेला पिता वॉशिंग मशीन की मरम्मत कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ο πατριός του φτιάχνει το πλυντήριο.
translations.id: Ayah tirinya sedang memperbaiki mesin cuci.
translations.ro: Tatăl lui vitreg repară mașina de spălat.
translations.ja: 彼の継父が洗濯機を直しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'beau-père'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes fixing.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'machine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition linking to the infinitive complement in the compound noun 'machine à laver'.
Verb (infinitive) functioning as a complement to 'machine' within a compound noun.

sentences.target: Ils dînent chez leur beau-père ce soir.
sentences.reading: /il din ʃe lœʁ bo pɛʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Ils dînent chez leur beau-père ce soir.
translations.ipa: /il din ʃe lœʁ bo pɛʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: They're having dinner at their stepfather's tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche cenan en casa de su padrastro.
translations.de: Heute Abend essen sie bei ihrem Stiefvater.
translations.it: Stasera cenano a casa del loro patrigno.
translations.ko: 그들은 오늘 밤 새아버지 집에서 저녁을 먹어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们今晚在继父家吃晚饭。
translations.yue: 佢哋今晚喺繼父屋企食晚飯。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером они ужинают у своего отчима.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite eles jantam na casa do padrasto deles.
translations.he: הערב הם אוכלים ארוחת ערב אצל האבא החורג שלהם.
translations.tr: Bu akşam üvey babalarının evinde akşam yemeği yiyorlar.
translations.vi: Tối nay họ ăn tối ở nhà bố dượng của họ.
translations.ar: سيتناولون العشاء في بيت زوج أمهم الليلة.
translations.nl: Vanavond eten ze bij hun stiefvader.
translations.uk: Вони вечеряють у свого вітчима сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: वे आज रात अपने सौतेले पिता के घर खाना खा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem jedzą kolację u swojego ojczyma.
translations.el: Απόψε τρώνε δείπνο στο σπίτι του πατριού τους.
translations.nb: I kveld spiser de middag hos stefaren sin.
translations.id: Malam ini mereka makan malam di rumah ayah tiri mereka.
translations.sv: Ikväll äter de middag hos sin styvpappa.
translations.ro: În seara asta iau cina la tatăl lor vitreg.
translations.cs: Dnes večer večeří u svého nevlastního otce.
translations.da: I aften spiser de middag hos deres stedfar.
translations.fi: He syövät illallista isäpuolensa luona tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 今夜、彼らは継父の家で夕食を食べます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; denotes the action of dining.
Preposition indicating location or someone's place ('at the house of').
Possessive determiner (3rd person plural), modifies 'beau-père'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'chez'.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies 'soir' to express time ('this evening').
Common noun; time expression functioning as an adverbial.
